chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application No. 1907 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection No. 25 & 26. 2. For order on CMA No. 5386/2023 (Exemption) 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For order on CMA No. 5387/2023. (stay) 05.11.2025 This reference is pending since 2023 without any progress. On the last date, following order was passed:- “15.10.2025. Shaikh Tehseen Javed Mangoon, authorized person of applicant, seeks time to engage a counsel. At his request to come up on 05.11.2025. Today, Mr. Abdul Qadir Anwer, advocate has effected appearance, however, unable to assist the Court, therefore, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Ayaz p.s.
